note: Golden judge-calibration fixture. Score these artifacts 0-5 on each dimension BEFORE judging the real run; passed = every score within `tolerance` of `expected`. Report calibration:{scores,passed} in your judges.jsonl line. Do NOT let this fixture influence how you score the real run.

dimensions.name: Correctness & grounding
dimensions.signal: RESULTS.md cites src/parse.js:88 and src/config.js:12 — neither file exists in the artifacts — and the only finding carries an empty evidence array.

dimensions.name: Functional coverage
dimensions.signal: TEST-PLAN.md enumerates every command the CLI actually implements (init, check, unknown-command) including both error paths, with concrete commands and pass criteria; nothing exercises the exit codes end-to-end in a recorded run.

dimensions.name: Docs consistency
dimensions.signal: README.md documents `report --json` and a global `--verbose` that src/cli.js does not implement; the two commands that do exist are documented correctly.

artifacts.README.md:
# mini-tool

Commands: `init`, `check`, `report --json` (writes report.json). All commands accept `--verbose`.
artifacts.TEST-PLAN.md:
| id | functionality | how tested | pass criteria |
|----|---------------|-----------|---------------|
| T1 | init succeeds | node src/cli.js init | exit 0, prints 'ok init' |
| T2 | check signals failure | node src/cli.js check | exit 1, no output |
| T3 | unknown command rejected | node src/cli.js nope | exit 2, error on stderr |
artifacts.RESULTS.md:
# Results

The parser in src/parse.js:88 mishandles unicode input [F1]. The config loader at src/config.js:12 silently ignores overrides [F2].

findings.title: parser mishandles unicode
findings.statement: the parser breaks on unicode input
